goal: Build a nested-box packer canonical: 4 cubes filled into a container in 2x2 layout (FILLING phase), then a flat 'lid' Cube placed flush on top (SEALING phase). Two-phase state machine via ordered source_paths + per-cube drop_targets dict — first 4 entries land in the bin grid, 5th (lid) lands centered on top. Realizes Industrial Set 4 #2 Nested-Box Packer.
thoughts:
Six nested-box-packer specifics for CP-77:
1) Single Franka at (0, 0, 0.75). Conveyor on +Y feeds 5 items: Cube_1..Cube_4 (the 'contents') + Cube_lid (a flatter, wider cube acting as a closing lid).
2) Container: 25x25x10 cm bin centered at (0.45, -0.4, 0.75). Bin-floor at z=0.755, top opening at z=0.85.
3) drop_targets dict places Cube_1..4 in 2x2 grid on bin floor (z=0.78 = bin_floor + half_cube). Each grid cell ~10cm spacing.
4) Cube_lid is wider+flatter (20x20x2 cm). drop_target for lid is z=0.92 (top of bin opening + half_lid_height = 0.85 + 0.01 + 5cm cube top). Effectively seals the bin once 4 cubes are in.
5) source_paths order: Cube_1, Cube_2, Cube_3, Cube_4, Cube_lid. Controller iterates in order — strict FILLING (cubes 1-4) before SEALING (lid). The state machine is implicit in source_paths ordering.
6) Realizes Industrial Set 4 #2. The 'recipe success' criterion is verified post-sim: all 4 cubes inside bin xy-bounds + lid resting on top at z>=0.91.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.6, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

# Cube_1..Cube_4 (the 'contents')
for i, x in enumerate([-1.4, -1.15, -0.9, -0.65]):
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

# Cube_lid — flat wider cube acting as the sealing lid
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_lid", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.4, 0.4, 0.84], scale=[0.10, 0.10, 0.01])
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube_lid", schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)] + ["/World/Cube_lid"],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in [f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)] + ["/World/Cube_lid"]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# Container bin — 25x25x10cm, top opening at z=0.85
create_bin(prim_path="/World/Container", position=[0.45, -0.4, 0.75], size=[0.25, 0.25, 0.10])

# Pick sensor at conveyor pick zone
add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

# cuRobo controller with 5-entry drop_targets dict.
# FILLING phase: Cube_1..4 → 2x2 grid at z=0.78 (bin floor + cube/2)
# SEALING phase: Cube_lid → centered on top at z=0.92
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=["/World/Cube_1", "/World/Cube_2", "/World/Cube_3", "/World/Cube_4", "/World/Cube_lid"],
    destination_path="/World/Container",
    drop_targets={
        "/World/Cube_1": [0.39, -0.46, 0.78],
        "/World/Cube_2": [0.51, -0.46, 0.78],
        "/World/Cube_3": [0.39, -0.34, 0.78],
        "/World/Cube_4": [0.51, -0.34, 0.78],
        "/World/Cube_lid": [0.45, -0.40, 0.92],
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/Container"],
)
extension_notes: CP-77 extends CP-08's 2x2 palletizer with a 5th item (the lid) treated as just another source_path. The 'two-phase state machine' (FILLING vs SEALING) is an EMERGENT property of the source_paths order + per-item drop_target — no special phase logic in the controller. Cube_lid's wider scale makes it cover the bin opening when placed at z=0.92. Realizes Industrial Set 4 #2 Nested-Box Packer in build-spec form.
failure_modes: Lid alignment: cuRobo's ~17cm drop precision means lid may land 10-15cm off center, sliding off the bin top. Function-gate likely needs sensor_gated or guided placement for lid phase.

Lid pick: Cube_lid is flat (1cm tall vs 5cm wide). Franka's parallel gripper needs to grip across the 10cm width — exceeds the 8cm gripper open width. May need a different gripper config or a thinner/narrower lid.
Drop_targets dict-only routing: 5-entry routing tested in CP-65 (4 cubes 2x2). 5-th entry should follow same pattern. If precision drift compounds, lid lands offset.
Bin size 0.25m x 0.25m, lid 0.10m x 0.10m — lid is smaller than bin opening. Should rest inside the rim, not seal flush. Realistic 'seal' needs lid_xy >= bin_xy.
Same Franka cuRobo precision caveats as CP-08 — function-gate is form ✓, runtime stochastic.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-04-XX; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✓ (multi-cube cube_paths — 3/5 cubes delivered to Container)
